summary: A decent‑quality recording captures an energetic show highlighted by a crowd‑loving Casey Jones.
review: The reviewer finds this version of the concert “not too shabby,” indicating a generally good listening experience despite no technical details. The performance itself is praised, especially the rousing rendition of “Casey Jones” that had the audience going wild. No specific band‑member or mix issues are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 ★) notes solid show performance and acceptable recording quality; limited data gives medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: "Not too shabby" suggests a clear enough capture, though no details on soundboard vs audience or specific mix issues are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic crowd response, especially during Casey Jones; intermission anecdote adds atmosphere but no criticism of pacing.
